mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_seq ,n.title ,n.view_count ,n.top_yn ,n.use_yn ,u.name AS rgst_user_name ,n.rgst_date_time FROM event.notice n LEFT JOIN event.users u ON u.user_seq = n.rgst_user_seq
AND n.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY n.top_yn DESC, n.rgst_date_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.notice (title, content, top_yn, use_yn, file_seq, rgst_user_seq, upt_user_seq) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{topYn}, #{useYn}, #{fileSeq}, #{rgstUserSeq}, #{uptUserSeq})
mapper.update: UPDATE event.notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE notice_seq = #{noticeSeq}
